texto: I feel like my life is made up of tiny puzzle parts that no longer fit together. Imagine working on a puzzle only to find that the final picture can never be complete because one of its pieces is missing. This is exactly what's happened to my life
autor: it has become impossible to put it back together.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a it has become impossible to put it back together.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I feel like my life is made up of tiny puzzle parts that no longer fit together. Imagine working …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, zeina-kassem, crossing pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e crossing.
